_comment: JPY intervention / jawboning watch (#4, D025). Gate for usdjpy/eurjpy/gbpjpy in /weekly + /validate. Claude UPDATES jawboning[] from web search each /weekly JPY run (same discipline as cb_calendar). spot vs intervention_level → HARD_BLOCK new shorts-of-JPY (= longs of usdjpy / eurjpy / gbpjpy) inside the band; recent jawboning within --days → at least CAUTION. Push verified_through forward each review. intervention_level/caution_band in the pair's own price units (JPY pips → whole-figure levels). Levels seeded 2026-06 from _HOT (usdjpy spot 160.5 ~ MoF 160.7; eurjpy record 185; gbpjpy record 214).

jawboning.quote: Japan shifting to ambush tactics — silent intervention without advance jawboning; traders can no longer rely on warnings; 11.7 trillion yen deployed Apr-May 2026
talks with US Treasury Sec. Bessent reaffirming shared commitment to coordinate in FX markets if necessary
fully prepared to take decisive action against speculative/excessive FX moves (G7)
jawboning.source: web search 2026-06-21 (XTB/forex.com — USDJPY breached 161, since-1986 territory)
